title: IndusInd Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)

jsonLd.title: IndusInd Bank is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with IndusInd Bank! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About IndusInd Bank:
IndusInd Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank!
